name: KotoShogi
description: 本将棋を端末で。合法手・持ち駒・成り・王手と盤上演出に対応。

codegen.comment: KOTO-0156 model: the steady play frame walked four 16 KiB code-window tiles and the 81-cell glyph loop straddled a tile boundary (hardware phase=160: refills=166, vm_us~230ms, fps=4). The title/victory scenes end in `continue` so outline_cold_blocks relocates them to the tail, and relocate_preamble pulls the loop start toward word 0, shrinking the steady play walk. KOTO-0169 Stage 4: the compact comparison templates re-broke that carefully tuned layout (sim tile profile regressed past the 2-refill floor), so this app also pins the pre-Stage-4 templates.
